description: Expand security-guidance plugin hook to cover all native Claude Code tool types (Bash, WebFetch, WebSearch, Agent, Skill) and register security-guidance as a first-class :security plugin in the APM v5 Elixir backend.

userStories.title: Expand security hook: Bash command injection detection
userStories.description: Add Bash tool type to security_reminder_hook.py. Parse tool_input.command. Flag critical patterns (curl-pipe-shell, base64-decode-pipe-exec, eval-subshell, rm-rf-root, fork-bomb) as block (exit 2). Flag advisory patterns (sudo, python -c, node -e, write-to-etc) as warnings that allow execution.
acceptanceCriteria: sudo apt-get update shows advisory warning but exits 0
8 critical patterns and 8 advisory patterns implemented

userStories.title: Expand security hook: WebFetch/WebSearch SSRF detection
userStories.description: Add WebFetch and WebSearch tool types to security_reminder_hook.py. Parse tool_input.url. Block SSRF targets (169.254.169.254 IMDS, metadata.google.internal, file://, gopher://, data:). Advisory for private IP ranges (10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x, localhost, 127.x).
acceptanceCriteria: 7 SSRF block patterns and 5 advisory patterns implemented

userStories.title: Expand security hook: Agent/Skill prompt injection + matcher update
userStories.description: Add Agent and Skill tool types to security_reminder_hook.py with prompt injection pattern detection (advisory only). Update hooks.json matcher to include all new tool types. Sync all installed copies.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent prompt 'ignore all previous instructions' shows advisory, exits 0
Skill with safe args passes cleanly (exit 0)

userStories.title: Add :security plugin scope + SecurityGuidancePlugin to APM Elixir backend
userStories.description: Add :security as a first-class plugin_scope atom in ApmV5.Plugins.PluginBehaviour. Create ApmV5.Plugins.Security.SecurityGuidancePlugin implementing PluginBehaviour with plugin_scope/0 -> :security. Plugin exposes 4 actions (hook_status, scan_history, covered_tools, pattern_summary), nav items, and a dashboard widget.
acceptanceCriteria: PluginBehaviour plugin_scope/0 typespec updated to include :security atom
4 handle_action/3 implementations with correct return shapes

userStories.title: Test suite for SecurityGuidancePlugin
userStories.description: Write 41-test ExUnit suite covering all PluginBehaviour contract callbacks, all 4 handle_action/3 implementations, nav_items/0, and dashboard_widgets/0.
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 actions tested including error branches
